title: Implement biological reintroduction works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement biological reintroduction works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for biological reintroduction works

pcs.text: Identify goal and objectives for biological reintroduction project from restoration plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify goal and objectives for biological reintroduction project from restoration plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify goal and objectives for biological reintroduction project from restoration plan.

pcs.text: Identify method and timing of biological reintroduction work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify method and timing of biological reintroduction work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify method and timing of biological reintroduction work.

pcs.text: Identify the need for habitat features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the need for habitat features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the need for habitat features.

pcs.text: Select tools and materials required and check functionality and cleanliness

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and materials required and check functionality and cleanliness.

pcs.text: Identify, obtain and store biological materials required for reintroduction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, obtain and store biological materials required for reintroduction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, obtain and store biological materials required for reintroduction.

pcs.text: Determine and organise labour and machinery requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and organise labour and machinery requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and organise labour and machinery requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare a works schedule and provide to management or client

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a works schedule and provide to management or client.
